semanticActions.intent: Verify live cognitive provider evidence before promoting the visual proof model.
Project the shared visual proof model.
Materialize ASCII and HTML surfaces from the same visual model.
Hash the model and projection surfaces.
Emit receipts for hardening, projection, and materialization.

steps.intent: Verify the existing live Gemini cognitive evidence required by the story conveyor.
Project candidate and promoted visual proof models from the operator story.
Emit a run-local receipt binding this visual proof packet to live Gemini evidence.

content.completionPosture: This run-local receipt binds the visual proof packet to existing live Gemini Story-to-TDD invocation evidence without copying secret material.
Provider candidate evidence was hardened into one promoted visual proof model. Provider output alone did not grant authority.

steps.intent: Materialize ASCII projection from the promoted model.

content.completionPosture: ASCII projection was materialized from the promoted visual proof model.

steps.intent: Materialize HTML projection from the promoted model.

content: Authority posture: promoted visual model, generated projection surfaces, resolver materialization receipts

content.completionPosture: HTML projection was materialized from the same promoted visual proof model as the ASCII projection.

claimRefs: Provider candidate does not grant authority.

claims: Cognitive evidence exists before visual model hardening.
content.completionPosture: Cognitive candidate is preserved as evidence and requires hardening before projection.

claimRefs: Hardening promotes one shared visual proof model.

claims: Promoted visual model is the source truth for ASCII and HTML.
content.completionPosture: The promoted visual proof model is ready for projection.

claimRefs: ASCII projection uses the promoted visual model hash.

claims: ASCII projection is generated from the promoted model.
content.completionPosture: ASCII projection is ready for materialization proof.

claimRefs: HTML projection uses the same promoted visual model hash as ASCII.

claims: HTML projection is generated from the promoted model.
content.completionPosture: HTML projection is ready for materialization proof.

claimRefs: Both surfaces materialized from the same promoted visual model.

claims: ASCII and HTML proof surfaces were materialized from one promoted model.
content.completionPosture: Visual proof surfaces are materialized and ready for reviewer inspection.
The live visual proof packet records cognitive, hardening, projection, and materialization handoffs.
ASCII and HTML proof surfaces were materialized from the same promoted visual proof model through resolver-mediated SEJ/SOG stages.

steps.intent: Project command result for the CLI.

forbiddenClaims: ASCII and HTML came from separate models
provider candidate granted authority without hardening
completionPosture: The visual proof materialization graph produces reviewable ASCII and HTML surfaces from one promoted model and leaves packet/receipt evidence for every stage.
